quote: Namaskar Gurudev, my salutations to Guru Maa and all the seekers.
speaker: Chinmay
title: How Chinmay Transformed Sibling Rivalry

quote:
I am Chinmay Prabhu Ghat and
I am 22 years old.
speaker: Chinmay
title: How Chinmay Transformed Sibling Rivalry

quote:
It has been
two years since I connected with the inner self, but in these two years,
due to Guru's grace, I have undergone so much transformation that even those who practice
yoga, meditation, etc.
speaker: Chinmay
title: How Chinmay Transformed Sibling Rivalry

quote:
for 20 years would
not have achieved this much.
speaker: Chinmay
title: How Chinmay Transformed Sibling Rivalry

quote:
Actually, two years is too much,
but for Sadguru, a moment is enough to bring about
transformation.
speaker: Chinmay
title: How Chinmay Transformed Sibling Rivalry

quote: Hello, my name is Nan Ra.
speaker: Unknown
title: Every Word from a Living Guru

quote:
I stay in
Mumbai and uh my profession or my my
domain is actually finance.
speaker: Unknown
title: Every Word from a Living Guru

quote:
So when I
came here, I never got a single work to
do related to finance.
speaker: Unknown
title: Every Word from a Living Guru

quote:
Apart from that I
I was given all other work.
speaker: Unknown
title: Every Word from a Living Guru

quote:
I got to observe it
very closely.
speaker: Unknown
title: Every Word from a Living Guru

quote:
So I
said okay let's turn back and look for
it.
speaker: Unknown
title: Divine Protection Saved Me

quote:
This was very strange behavior from
my side because normally I said that
okay if you have forgotten it we will
see it when we come back.
speaker: Unknown
title: Divine Protection Saved Me

quote:
First let us
go and finish the main work for which we
have come.
speaker: Unknown
title: Divine Protection Saved Me

quote: But I decided to turn back.
speaker: Unknown
title: Divine Protection Saved Me

quote:
When I turned one vehicle, two wheeler
you know came at a very high speed and
collided on my car at an angle.
speaker: Unknown
title: Divine Protection Saved Me
